title: AGR Policies File
description: A collection of tenant-wide governance policy rules. Load with `agr policy load <file>` or via the SDK.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support

policies.description: List of policy rules to create or update.

name.description: Human-readable name for the policy rule.

description.description: Detailed description of what this rule does and why.

decision.description: What happens when the condition matches.

priority.description: Higher priority wins within the same effect level (0-10000).

tags.description: Tags for organizing and filtering policies.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata for the policy rule.

platforms.description: Only apply to agents on these platforms. Empty = all platforms.

environments.description: Only apply in these environments. Empty = all environments.

data_classification_min.description: Only apply when data classification meets or exceeds this level.
